title: Notify Stakeholders (Human Resources)
acceptanceCriteria: System can perform "Notify Stakeholders" only when business rules and validations for HumanResources are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
businessRules: required fields must be present before submission
status transitions must follow Draft -> Submitted -> Approved/Rejected -> Archived
only the owner or an admin may edit a record while in Draft
a rejected record requires a reason before the owner can resubmit

positiveTests: Notify Stakeholders succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
negativeTests: Notify Stakeholders is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
validationTests: Each business validation listed for Human Resources is independently exercised against Notify Stakeholders.
permissionTests: Notify Stakeholders is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
workflowTests: Full lifecycle test: create -> Notify Stakeholders -> downstream state is consistent with the Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern.
regressionTests: Medium - secondary step, breaking this degrades but does not block the module
coverageRules: REQ-HUMANRESOURCES-09 must map to at least one test and one implementation file.

release.rollbackStrategy: Disable or roll back Human Resources Notify Stakeholders changes while preserving audit data.

automationTests: Positive: Notify Stakeholders succeeds with valid data and authorized role
Negative: Notify Stakeholders rejected with invalid data
Access: Notify Stakeholders rejected for unauthorized role
